docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY WERNER MICHELE AS TO DEFENDANT S AND C FORD IVECO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-30-1991 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 00
